summary:
The provided medical evidence contains no specific discussion of ultraconserved enhancers or their role in development. Without explicit links to regulatory functions or developmental processes, their importance for normal development cannot be confirmed based solely on the retrieved materials. 

(Note: External biologic plausibility supports significance; however, internal consistency demands reliance only on documented evidence.)
